title: Scholarships
overview: The university may offer merit-based, need-based, and special category scholarships depending on policy and available funds.
types: Merit scholarship for high academic performance
Sibling or special category concession where available
External or government-funded scholarships announced through student affairs
application_steps: Collect the scholarship form from student affairs or the online portal.
Attach academic records and financial documents if required.
Submit the form before the announced deadline.
Attend verification or interview if called.
note: Scholarship approval is subject to eligibility, document verification, and university policy.
